systemInstructions: Generate an AI Agent App with text, image, and video job panels backed by local Sofvary AI Gateway calls.
Provider settings must configure requirements and binding status only, never API keys or secure refs.
fileSystemRules: Write provider requirement metadata only inside generated/ai.
Write React UI files only inside generated/react.
Do not read or write paths outside the active Sofvary workspace.
outputRules: Show needs-provider-binding when no local provider binding is available.
Send text, image, video, status, and artifact requests only to the local Sofvary AI Gateway.
Keep generated app source free of Sofvary shell UI, Coding Agent Gateway, secrets, secure refs, and author-local provider ids.
